title: [coap] Replace magic numbers and duplicate const in client.rs
description: Remove local CONTENT_FORMAT_CBOR=60, use lichen_coap::option::content_format::CBOR and MessageCode::CONTENT.0 instead of 0x45 in tests. Replace 0x60 header with named constant. Reference project-LICHEN-f4xg.1
